texto: You'd be amazed how much fun you can have if you get out of your own head. The problem is that now people are only interested in themselves. What we have is a non-voting generation. That's what they should call you guys, the non-voting generation. You think you can't fix anything until you fix yourselves. Well, let me be the first to tell you, you will never fix yourselves.p.32
explicacao: Orientação direta de Stephen Elliott sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “You'd be amazed how much fun you can have if you get out of your own head. The problem is that no…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, verdade, voting, útil em momentos de reflexao.
